title: Project Miner Local Field Readiness Checklist
objective: Reduce PM-to-lead and PM-to-field prep friction by adding a browser-local field readiness checklist to the Project Miner intake workbench, while preserving that it is prep evidence only and not field release, assignment, schedule, status, import, approval, or production authority.
active_role: Technical Repo Authority / PM Product Coordinator / AI Orchestration Field-Prep Implementer
implemented_scope: Add a Local Field Readiness Checklist to /pm-review/import-intake.
Persist checklist state only in candidate-scoped browser localStorage.
Include field readiness checked/open evidence in the browser-local Field Kickoff Brief.
Include field readiness checklist state in the browser-local PM brief.
Extend the focused import-intake smoke to prove localStorage state, clear behavior, exported content, exact four read seams, zero mutation calls, and no approve/persist/submit/import controls.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
allowed_actions: Modify the local operations-web import-intake page.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
Use one read-only sidecar scout for field-readiness wording and checklist review.
Run focused local validation, commit, push, and restore host parity.
not_allowed: No DNS, auth, ingress, or secret change.
validation_steps: rg -n "kickoff approved|released to field|ready for execution|ready for field|authorized work|dispatch|production-ready|go/no-go passed|customer confirmed" apps/operations-web/app/pm-review/import-intake/page.tsx apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts
corepack pnpm --dir apps/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts

corepack pnpm --dir apps/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.pm-import-candidate.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-admission-plan.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-approval-readiness.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts
validation_results: operations-web typecheck passed after fixing helper signatures.
operations-web production build passed with /pm-review/import-intake in the route output.
Prohibited field-release wording scan passed with no matches.
Focused import-intake Playwright smoke passed with 1 passed after refreshing the production build.
Focused PM intake Playwright smoke suite passed with 4 passed.
Packet JSON parse passed with packet-json-ok.
git diff --check passed with line-ending normalization warnings only.
